creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #1)
Frankly I *too* was hesitant. But examined it,
and it doesn't do anything that complicated
that draws, or contradicts "features" from
newer releases (of FreeBSD).
But as I reflect on this further. I think I'd
like to simply "enhance" this port, and
re-introduce it by another name.

So I'm going to close this.

Thank you very much for your time, and sorry
for any bother, Renee, Tobias.

--Chris
